title: X6820-H773AB-T-GL-230918V743-231120V967_20231120160516
description:
Caution! This update may crash rooted devices.
Please plug in charger to OTA upgrade when power is lower than 50%.
Update Version: X6820-H773AB-T-GL-231120V967
Optimized Issues:
1. Optimized for the camera icon on the lock screen to reduce mistouch operation.
2. Optimized the People album in AI Gallery for a better user experience.
3. Improved the accuracy of step counting on Zero Screen after system upgrade.
4. Enhanced the smooth running and security of the system.
5. Updated Google Security Patch to November.
Reminding:
1. Optimized system stability and performance while fixing other issues.
2. Visit the XClub forum (Geekbar) for more information.
